speaker: agent
text: Thank you for calling Apex Health, this is Sofia. How can I help?

speaker: customer
text: Hi, I got a medical bill for three thousand dollars and I don't understand why.

speaker: agent
text: I completely understand, let's look into it together. Member ID?

speaker: agent
text: Thank you. Can you confirm the date of service on the bill?

speaker: customer
text: It was March 3rd, at Riverside Hospital.

speaker: agent
text: Got it. Let me pull up that claim.

speaker: agent
text: Okay, I have it here. Let me walk you through the cost breakdown.

speaker: customer
text: Yes please, that would help.

speaker: agent
text: So the hospital billed twelve thousand dollars total. Your plan's allowed amount brought that down to forty-two hundred, then your coinsurance applied, leaving three thousand after a five hundred dollar deductible—

speaker: customer
text: Wait, hold on, back up a second.

speaker: agent
text: Of course, go ahead.

speaker: customer
text: You said a five-hundred-dollar deductible, but I already met my deductible back in February.

speaker: agent
text: That's a great catch. Let me verify your deductible status for this year.

speaker: agent
text: You're absolutely right. Your deductible was met on February eighteenth, so it should not have been applied again—

speaker: customer
text: So the three thousand is wrong?

speaker: agent
text: Correct. The claim was processed against your deductible a second time in error. I'm removing that now.

speaker: customer
text: Okay, so what will I actually owe?

speaker: agent
text: After the correction, just your coinsurance on the allowed amount, which comes to two hundred and fifty dollars.

speaker: customer
text: Two fifty, okay, that makes so much more sense now.

speaker: agent
text: I'm glad we caught it. You'll get a corrected statement in seven to ten business days.

speaker: customer
text: And I should ignore the current bill until then?

speaker: agent
text: Exactly, don't pay the three thousand. Wait for the corrected one.

speaker: customer
text: Perfect. Thank you so much, Sofia, you've been a huge help.

speaker: agent
text: My pleasure. Take care, and call back anytime.
